title: November 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 21''' is the 325th day of the year (326th in leap years), with 40 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Christie Golden]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Alexander Siddig]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 20|''Star Wars'' (1977) 20]] published. The cover date is February.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 91|''Star Wars Weekly'' 91]] published.
*[[1991]] – [[Megan Ilnitzki]] is born.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars Box Set]]'' published.
*1995 – [[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: A New Hope'' trade paperback]] published.
*1995 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' trade paperback]] published.
*1995 – [[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' trade paperback]] published.
*1995 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Jack Purvis]] dies.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 4|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 4]]
*2001 – [[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika (trade paperback)|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Best of PC]]'' is released on [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*[[2008]] – "[[Bombad Jedi]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2012]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 2|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 2]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|''Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away'' Part 1]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 57|''Star Wars'' (2015) 57]] published.
*2018 – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation 2|''Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation'' 2]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Vader Immortal – Episode III]]'' released.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian — Season Two, Part One]]'' published.
*? – [[Christopher Chuckry]] is born.
<noinclude>
